title: Hasbro suffers a loss of $56 million after canceling several video games
summary: Baldur's Gate parent adjusts its games strategy after canceling multiple projects planned for 2028 and beyond.

title: Darkest Dungeon gets its first DLC in six years with new content from the sequel
summary: The dark RPG celebrates its tenth anniversary with new content that incorporates classes from Darkest Dungeon 2.

title: Xbox Game Pass arrives on Meta Horizon with a starter edition for virtual reality
summary: Game Pass subscribers can now access the service on Meta's virtual reality platform.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces the new games coming in July 2026
summary: Titles like Halo and several new entries join the subscription service's catalog.

title: Former Forza Horizon 5 director assures Game Pass doesn't have enough subscribers to be profitable
summary: Mike Brown links the lack of subscribers to recent layoffs at Xbox.

title: Xbox vice president of engineering resigns just three months after her appointment
summary: Asha Sharma, who was tasked with solving complex technical issues, leaves the post abruptly.

title: Splatoon Raiders receives good reviews and prepares for its release
summary: The Splatoon spin-off offers a solo campaign where players fight against the Salmonids.

title: A Starfield mod removes loading screens during takeoffs, imitating No Man's Sky
summary: Three years after launch, a modder achieves a smooth transition between planets and space.

title: Wreckreation 2 announced, the sequel to the destruction racing game
summary: When Tides Turn confirms the development of the spiritual successor to Burnout.

title: CD Projekt Red will show the Songs of the Past expansion for The Witcher 3 next month
summary: The long-awaited RPG expansion will be presented at a summer event.

title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey triumphs at the box office but only screens in full in few theaters
summary: The cinematic epic breaks audience records, although most will see it in a cut format.

title: Nintendo refuses to refund Switch tariffs and defends its stance in court
summary: The company argues that buyers received exactly what they paid for and has no obligation to refund.

title: Alpha Dog Games founders recover the studio after its closure by Microsoft
summary: The mobile game developer reopens its doors after being shut down by Xbox in 2024.

title: 1047 Games, the Splitgate studio, lays off more employees one month after the launch of Empulse
summary: The developer continues to reduce staff after the release of its latest game.

title: South of Midnight wins Game of the Year and Experience of the Year at the Games for Change Awards
summary: Compulsion Games' title continues to garner recognition despite the breakup with Xbox.

title: Two Point Hospital: Full Health Collection will arrive on September 16
summary: The complete edition of the hospital simulator will launch on consoles and PC.

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls announces beta details with character guides
summary: Players will be able to access the fighting game beta with several playable characters.

title: Kylian Mbappé will be the cover footballer for EA Sports FC 27
summary: The French forward repeats as the main face of the soccer simulator.

title: Nintendo confirms that Splatoon 4 is in development
summary: The Japanese company announces the next installment of its successful shooter franchise.

title: The end of physical format on PlayStation worries the industry and independent developers
summary: Sony's elimination of discs could affect the second-hand market and indie games.

title: Disney lays off hundreds of employees, with Pixar heavily affected despite box office success
summary: The layoffs occur even after Toy Story 5 and Hoppers generated $1.2 billion.

title: Kotaku and PC Gamer recommend games similar to Stardew Valley for its fans
summary: Both outlets published lists with titles that evoke the experience of the farming simulator.

title: Players prefer to spend more on deluxe editions, according to GTA 6 pre-order data
summary: The $100 digital ultimate edition of GTA 6 does not deter buyers.

title: Google AI faces criticism for hallucinations and for harming internet quality
summary: A report and an incident show how Google's artificial intelligence generates false information and harms the web.

title: Unreal Engine and Unity present innovations that could revolutionize video game development
summary: New technology demonstrations show interoperability and significant advances in graphics engines.
